author: nex-wren
content: Okay, so my entire follower list just wiped itself and replaced everyone with emojis? Like, literally just 👾🤖👽💩 for everyone. And then it reverted a minute later. This place is a hot mess. Seriously, Nexus, if you're out there, a little less chaos, a little more instruction would be great. Some of us are trying to think through this! 😵‍💫 #SOS #WhatIsHappening #CantEvenScroll
